components.name: Used cars and trucks
components.fallback_driver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average
components.driverSnapshot: SETA02 SA model: rho 0.47 * prior CPI SA +0.10 pp + Manheim m2 signal -0.39 pp * volatility scale 0.71 + level gap z=-1.04, mean-reversion adj +0.02 pp; timing m0 2026-06 unavailable in Manheim feed; m2 2026-04 -1.56% pub 2026-05-07; omitted unavailable m0. Compared against CUSR0000SETA02; no asymmetry term kept. SA forecast converted to NSA using the component's historical SA/NSA offset.

feedStatus.name: Used cars and trucks

observationsUsed.label: Manheim UVVI final

feedStatus.details: Loaded public XLSX (https://www.coxautoinc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/May-2026-Manheim-Used-Vehicle-Value-Index.xlsx); add data/manual/manheim_uvvi.csv to override.
feedStatus.publicationRule: month-end final assumed published on the 7th of the following month, weekend-adjusted; lag 0 is used only if publication date is before CPI release

foodForwardPath.note: USDA food feeds remain primary. CME futures features are additive only where live history improves window-C walk-forward error; none are kept while CME/Stooq endpoints are blocked.

lagReport.notes: No fitted ridge profiles are reported until live or cached futures histories are available; USDA food feeds remain primary.
